hero.name: Lã Tất Thành
hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.description: I'm a developer with 8 years of experience, mainly in Front-end, and about a year in Back-end with Laravel. Experienced with Salesforce and Shopify, I focus on creating efficient, scalable, and user-friendly web solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a dedicated Frontend Developer with 8 years of experience, primarily focused on creating modern, performant, and maintainable web interfaces. I also have around one year of experience in backend development with Laravel.
about.passion: I'm passionate about building user-friendly, high-quality web applications. I enjoy supporting my teammates, learning new technologies when needed, and continuously improving my craft.
about.experience_1: 8+ years of experience in Frontend development
about.experience_2: 1 year of experience in Backend development with Laravel
about.experience_3: Experienced with Salesforce (3 years) and Shopify (2 years)
about.clean_code_desc: Writing maintainable, readable, and performance-optimized code
about.design_desc: Focusing on clean layouts and interactive, intuitive interfaces
about.performance_desc: Applying best practices like lazy loading, code splitting, and optimization
about.collaboration_desc: Good listener and supportive teammate, open to feedback and new challenges

portfolio-website.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio-website.description: A responsive portfolio website with modern design, smooth animations, and dark mode support.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm open to new opportunities and interesting projects. If you'd like to collaborate or simply connect, feel free to reach out.
contact.ctaDescription: Currently available for freelance or full-time opportunities. Let's build something great together.
contact.availabilityStatus: Open to new projects and full-time positions
contact.bottomCtaDescription: Have a project in mind? Let's connect and discuss how to make it a reality.
